info.name: Dynamic Approval Workflow Engine API
info.description:
Fully automated Postman collection — tokens are auto-fetched before every request if missing. No manual login needed!

##  Seed Users (run `python manage.py seed_data` first)
| Role      | Username | Password    | Email                  |
|-----------|----------|-------------|------------------------|
| Admin     | admin    | admin123    | admin@spinach.com      |
| Approver  | manager  | manager123  | manager@spinach.com    |
| Requester | employee | employee123 | employee@spinach.com   |

exec: // Auto-login script — runs before EVERY request in the collection.
// If any token is missing, it logs in automatically using seed data credentials.
function loginIfMissing(tokenKey, refreshKey, email, password, label, callback) {
console.log( label + ' token missing — auto-logging in...');
raw: JSON.stringify({ email: email, password: password })
console.error('Auto-login failed for ' + label + '. Is the server running?');
// Auto-login all 3 users if their tokens are missing

item.name: Step 1 – Authentication (Run ALL 3 logins first!)
item.description: Run all 3 login requests before anything else. Each one auto-saves its own token variable.

item.name: Register New User
item.description: Open to all. No token needed. Uses {{$randomUserName}} and {{$randomEmail}} to generate unique values on every Send.

item.name: Get My Profile (Admin)
item.description: Returns the currently authenticated user's profile.

item.name: List All Users [Admin only]
item.description: Always uses admin_access_token — works regardless of who else you are logged in as.

item.name: List Users filtered by Role [Admin only]
Refresh Admin Token
item.description:
Use if admin_access_token has expired (after 60 mins).

⚠️ Because ROTATE_REFRESH_TOKENS=True, calling this will blacklist your old refresh token and issue a new one. Both admin_access_token AND admin_refresh_token are updated automatically.

exec: console.log('admin_refresh_token rotated and saved (old one is now blacklisted)');

item.name: Logout (Admin)
item.description:
Blacklists the admin refresh token. Tokens are cleared automatically.

⚠️ IMPORTANT: You must run '1a. Login as Admin' first. If you get 'Token is invalid or expired' it means the token was already blacklisted — you are already logged out. Just run Login again.

exec: throw new Error('admin_refresh_token is empty. Run "1a. Login as Admin" first before logging out.');
console.log('Admin logged out. Tokens cleared. Run 1a again to log back in.');
console.log('⚠️ Token already blacklisted — you were already logged out. Tokens cleared. Run 1a to log back in.');

item.name: Step 2 – Workflows [Admin]
item.description: All workflow management actions require Admin role. Uses admin_access_token automatically.

item.name: Sync Workflow (Save Stages + Rules in bulk)
Step 3 – Stages [Admin]
item.description: Add and manage stages within a workflow. Requires Admin role.

item.name: Reorder Stages (Drag and Drop)
item.description: Paste stage_id_2 first and stage_id_1 second to swap their order.

item.name: Step 4 – Rules [Admin]
item.description: Configure dynamic rule conditions for a workflow. Requires Admin role.

item.name: Create Rule – Skip Finance Stage if amount < 1000
item.description: Uses stage_id_2 (Finance stage) as the target to skip. The seed data also creates this same rule.

item.name: Create Rule – AND Group (nested condition)
item.description: Creates a group node with AND logic. Add child leaf rules to this group via parent_rule field.

item.name: Step 5 – Submit Requests [Employee/Requester]
item.description: Requests are submitted by the Employee (Requester role). Uses employee_access_token automatically.

item.name: Submit Request – High Value (all stages triggered, amount=75000)
item.description: amount=75000 is above 1000, so Finance stage is NOT skipped. Both stages will run.

item.name: Submit Request – Low Value (Finance stage SKIPPED by rule, amount=500)
item.description: amount=500 is below 1000. The rule engine will skip the Finance Final Approval stage automatically.

item.name: Step 6 – Approve / Reject [Manager/Approver]
item.description: Stage 1 (Manager Review) is approved by the Manager. Stage 2 (Finance) is approved by Admin. Each request uses the correct token automatically.

item.name: Approve Stage 1 (as Manager/Approver)
item.description: Uses manager_access_token. The Manager approves the first pending stage.

item.name: Approve Stage 2 (as Admin – Finance)
item.description: Uses admin_access_token. Admin approves the Finance Final Approval stage.

item.name: Reject Stage (as Manager/Approver)
item.description: Comments are required for rejection. Uses manager_access_token.

item.name: Step 7 – Rollback [Admin or Requester]
item.description: Rollback can be performed by Admin or the original requester (employee). Separate requests for each type.

item.name: Rollback – Terminate (as Employee/Requester)
item.description: The original requester can also terminate their own request.

item.name: Step 8 – Audit Logs [Admin only]
item.description: Full audit trail of all actions. Always uses admin_access_token.

item.name: Step 9 – Health Check
item.description: No authentication required.
